Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Overlord Malachi]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Overlord Malachi has official soldiers who are raiders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 3''' — Overlord Malachi manages a corner of Damasca in the name of the King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 3''' — Overlord Malachi's reputation is that he is distant but just.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Overlord Malachi is a ruler of a realm containing Myria village.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — Overlord Malachi has taken people from Simon's village.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — Overlord Malachi has Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 10''' — Overlord Malachi is responsible for this year's sacrifice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Malachi's full name is Malachi Daiasus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 19''' — Malachi Daiasus is an Overlord in service to the Damascan Kingdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 19''' — Malachi Daiasus is a faithful slave of King Zakareth the Sixth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Malachi Daiasus was responsible for the deaths of at least a dozen Myrian villagers and is dead.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Overlord Malachi wore a mask that allowed him to call terrifying amounts of power from his Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Overlord Malachi was defeated by Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Leah was left in Overlord Malachi's hands for weeks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Overlord Malachi died one month prior to the council.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Simon played a role in the death of Overlord Malachi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin threatens that if anything happens to his sisters, he will make Grandmaster Naraka suffer the same fate as Overlord Malachi.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — Malachi is an Overlord with a home in Bel Calem.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
